recommendations.title: Jealous
recommendations.overview: A divorced teacher suddenly becomes jealous of everyone, including her daughter, friends and neighbors.

recommendations.title: Harold and Maude
recommendations.overview: A deadpan young man obsessed with death meets an eccentric septuagenarian who teaches him to live life to the fullest.

recommendations.title: From the Land of the Moon
recommendations.overview: In 1950s France, a free-spirited woman trapped in an arranged marriage falls in love with an injured veteran of the Indochinese War.

recommendations.title: Amour
recommendations.overview: Georges and Anne are in their eighties. They are cultivated, retired music teachers. Their daughter, who is also a musician, lives abroad with her family. One day, Anne has a stroke, and the couple's bond of love is severely tested.

recommendations.title: Let Her Kill You

recommendations.title: Paris Can Wait

recommendations.title: First Girl I Loved
recommendations.overview: Seventeen-year-old Anne just fell in love with Sasha, the most popular girl at her L.A. public high school. But when Anne tells her best friend, Clifton—who has always harbored a secret crush on her—he does his best to get in the way.

recommendations.title: The Bucket List
